findings.description: Robert Raymond McKee was born on 29 February 1904 (a leap day) in Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland.

details.place: Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom

supporting_sources: Ireland, Civil Registration Indexes, 1845-1958 — birth entry for Robert Raymond M'Kee, registered Jan-Mar 1904 quarter
Ireland, Census, 1911 — Robert McKee in the household at Newry, County Down (age consistent with a 1904 birth)
California, World War II Draft Registration Cards, 1940-1947 — Robert Raymond McKee, giving date of birth 29 Feb 1904
